stable_routes.rationale: Hybrid landing is the stable public entry surface for the current Career launch.
Backend B5/B6 jobs surface is the stable public job library.
Job detail routes are stable only when the backend explicit seo gate allows indexing.
Recommendation index is a stable public recommendation entry surface and must not degrade into a job list.
MBTI recommendation detail routes are stable only when the backend explicit seo gate allows indexing.

candidate_routes.rationale: Guides are live editorial surfaces but not first-wave backend authority-critical routes.
Guide detail pages remain live editorial surfaces and should stay out of the stable launch tier.
Industry hubs are reachable and indexable but not part of the backend-owned first-wave authority path.
Industry details are live supporting surfaces and should remain candidate-tier.
Career tests are live entry surfaces but not first-wave backend authority-critical routes.
RIASEC start remains live, but it is not part of the stable authority-critical launch inventory.

hold_routes.rationale: Legacy slug bridge remains reachable but must stay out of launch-facing exposure.
Big5 recommendation detail is intentionally reachable but not part of the backend-owned first-wave recommendation launch.

noindex_routes.rationale: Query/result search pages must stay noindex and outside launch discoverability inventory.
RIASEC result is a private-style result surface and must stay out of launch discoverability inventory.

notes.stable: Stable routes map to the current backend-safe entry and detail classes. Detail classes remain gated by backend explicit seo contracts.
notes.candidate: Candidate routes are intentionally live but not first-wave backend authority-critical and should not be promoted to stable by discoverability helpers alone.
notes.hold: Hold routes remain reachable or legacy but are intentionally excluded from launch-facing exposure.
notes.noindex: Noindex routes are excluded from launch inventory and public discoverability even when reachable.
